content:
<!-- type: interaction lang: mermaid -->

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant CLI as jet install
    participant WM as WorkspaceManager
    participant PM as PackageManager
    participant FS as FileSystem
    participant REG as npm Registry

    CLI->>WM: WorkspaceMode::detect(root)
    WM->>FS: stat nx.json
    WM->>FS: stat jet-workspace.yaml
    WM->>FS: stat package.json (workspaces field)
    WM->>FS: stat pnpm-workspace.yaml
    Note over WM,FS: Priority: jet-workspace.yaml > package.json.workspaces > pnpm-workspace.yaml
    WM-->>CLI: WorkspaceMode::Jet(WorkspaceManager)

    CLI->>WM: topological_order()
    WM->>WM: Kahn's algorithm on workspace dep graph
    WM-->>CLI: [packages/utils, packages/ui, apps/web]

    loop Each pkg in topological order
        CLI->>PM: install_with_options(pkg.path)
        loop Each direct dep in pkg.dependencies
            PM->>WM: is_workspace_protocol(spec)
            alt spec = "workspace:*" | "workspace:^" | "workspace:~"
                PM->>WM: get_package(dep_name)
                WM-->>PM: WorkspacePackage { path }
                PM->>WM: resolve_workspace_protocol(spec, dep_name)
                WM-->>PM: resolved_version (e.g. "^1.5.0")
                PM->>FS: create relative symlink
                Note over PM,FS: node_modules/<dep> → ../../<pkg_path>
                PM->>PM: Build LockfileEntry\n{ workspace: true, local_path, version }
            else external semver range
                PM->>REG: fetch metadata
                REG-->>PM: PackageMetadata
                PM->>REG: download tarball
                REG-->>PM: tarball bytes
                PM->>FS: extract to ~/.jet-store/
                PM->>FS: hardlink into node_modules/
                PM->>PM: Build LockfileEntry\n{ workspace: false }
            end
        end
    end

    CLI->>FS: Write jet-lock.yaml
    Note over FS: workspace entries have workspace=true + localPath
```
